findings.issue: buildProcPidResult signature in Task 03 'What to do' step 2 declares `itv int`, but Task 05 Details explicitly states 'buildProcPidResult expects itv float64, so pass float64(itv) at the call site'. The round-2 fix note also confirms 'itv is int, float64(itv) cast at call site', meaning buildProcPidResult must accept float64. Task 03 signature with `itv int` contradicts this. Additionally, Task 05 'What to do' step 4 passes raw `itv` (no cast), contradicting its own Details section which says to cast. An implementer following these tasks as written will face a compile error or silent type confusion.
findings.fix: In Task 03 'What to do' step 2: change `itv int` to `itv float64` in the buildProcPidResult signature. In Task 05 'What to do' step 4: change `itv` to `float64(itv)` at the buildProcPidResult call site to match the Details section and the round-2 fix intent.

findings.issue: Link text/path mismatch: `[project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md)` — the link text says 'project.md' but the file referenced is 'overview.md'. The project knowledge directory has no project.md file.
findings.fix: Change link text to match the file: `[overview.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md)`.

findings.issue: Feature artifact links use bare relative paths without the docs/features/... directory prefix: `[001-feat-per-process-system-stats.md](001-feat-per-process-system-stats.md)`, etc. Links are broken from the task file's location in docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/. Tasks 01, 02, 04, 06, 07 all use the full path.
findings.fix: Prefix all three feature artifact link hrefs with 'docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/'.

findings.issue: Details section describes Task 01's output with lowercase `checkIOAvailable()`: 'It already contains ... `checkIOAvailable()`.' The round-2 fix exported the function as `CheckIOAvailable()` (uppercase C). This stale reference contradicts Task 01's corrected exported symbol.
findings.fix: Replace `checkIOAvailable()` with `CheckIOAvailable()` in the Details/Files description.

findings.issue: `[project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md)` references a non-existent file. The project knowledge directory contains overview.md, architecture.md, patterns.md, deployment.md — no project.md. The overview.md is already listed separately in this task, making this a broken duplicate entry.
findings.fix: Remove the `[project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md)` line. The existing `[overview.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md)` already covers project context.

findings.issue: Feature artifact links use bare relative paths without the docs/features/... prefix (same issue as Task 03): `[001-feat-per-process-system-stats.md](001-feat-per-process-system-stats.md)`, etc. Links are broken from the task file's actual location.
findings.fix: Prefix all three feature artifact link hrefs with 'docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/'.

findings.issue: TDD Anchor section is present for a code-writing task but contains zero test entries — only a prose justification for why unit tests are impossible for TUI callbacks. The section header signals implementers to write tests first, but there is nothing to write. The absence of any test anchor is confusing for a code task.
findings.fix: Either remove the TDD Anchor section entirely (acceptable when TUI prevents all unit testing) and move the justification to Details, or add at minimum a build-time check that can be stated as an anchor, e.g., '`make build` — confirms switchViewToProcPidStat compiles and all required symbols from Tasks 01/04 are resolved'.

findings.issue: The decisions.md reference in the first post-completion checklist item uses a bare backtick path rather than a markdown link: `docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/001-feat-per-process-system-stats-decisions.md`. All other tasks use the `[name](path)` format here.
findings.fix: Replace the backtick path with a markdown link: `[001-feat-per-process-system-stats-decisions.md](docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/001-feat-per-process-system-stats-decisions.md)`.
